hero.name: Germán Sandoval
hero.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I build scalable web applications with clean code and thoughtful UX.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I'm a passionate software engineer with experience building modern web applications. I love clean architecture, great developer experience, and shipping products people enjoy.

wizeline.bullet_0: Architected a real-time data pipeline processing 2M+ events/day for a US fintech client, reducing latency by 70%.
wizeline.bullet_1: Led a squad of 5 engineers, driving TypeScript adoption and establishing team code-review standards.
wizeline.bullet_2: Designed and shipped a micro-frontend architecture with Module Federation, cutting time-to-feature by 35%.
wizeline.bullet_3: Championed observability improvements (OpenTelemetry + Datadog), reducing mean time to recovery from 45 min to 8 min.

softtek.bullet_0: Built and maintained 4 client-facing web applications across retail and healthcare verticals.
softtek.bullet_1: Integrated Stripe and Conekta payment gateways, enabling $500K/month in transactions.
softtek.bullet_2: Revamped CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, reducing deploy times from 30 min to under 7 min.
softtek.bullet_3: Delivered a headless CMS migration (Contentful) that improved editor experience and content velocity.

freelance.bullet_0: Developed responsive websites and small SPAs for 10+ local businesses and startups.
freelance.bullet_1: Built a custom e-commerce solution with a real-time inventory dashboard for a local retailer.
freelance.bullet_2: Worked directly with clients to gather requirements, iterate on designs, and deliver on time.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.me_description: My personal portfolio and blog. Built with Next.js App Router, next-intl for multilingual support (EN/ES), Tailwind CSS v4, and framer-motion animations. Features dark mode, MDX blog, dynamic OG images, and RSS feed.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you.
